recommendation_context: review filters and execution thresholds because the runner is failing to convert opportunities
improve model quality and data coverage before promoting this family
tighten entry logic and retrain for better trade selection quality

maintenance_request.reason: Deep review of the March 12, 2026 paper evaluation indicates this champion lineage is failing for reasons that look more structural than stale. The latest artifact is negative on ROI and net PnL, has failure_rate=1.0, negative slippage headroom, zero calibration lift, low regime robustness, and no baseline-beaten windows. The execution picture is mixed, but the key point is that `contrarian_legacy` does fill and still loses money, while the hedge targets are mostly gate-blocked. Combined with repeated near-identical retirements in learning memory, this supports replacing the lineage with fresh challengers rather than retraining the same setup.

target_objective: reduce missed settlement windows while improving strict-gate pass rate on funding dislocations
